'''鈭歵-b-ng-f''' ('''katabngefoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:byhove|byhove]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-b-ng-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:byhove|byhove]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歵-b-ng-f
|-
! Lemma
| katabngefoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thitabngefoko|thitabngefoko]] || [[word:jitabngefoko|jitabngefoko]] || [[word:shitabngefoko|shitabngefoko]] || [[word:kitabngefoko|kitabngefoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thotabngefoko|thotabngefoko]] || [[word:jotabngefoko|jotabngefoko]] || [[word:shotabngefoko|shotabngefoko]] || [[word:kotabngefoko|kotabngefoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thatabngefoko|thatabngefoko]] || [[word:jatabngefoko|jatabngefoko]] || [[word:shatabngefoko|shatabngefoko]] || [[word:katabngefoko|katabngefoko]]

=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
